title: Dressrosa's Toys Become Human
description: Pages 12–16 focus on dressrosa's toys become human, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the characters active in this scene.
scene: This part follows Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7 as usopp's desperate scream causes Sugar to faint, turning Dressrosa's toys back into people and shattering Doflamingo's hidden order.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: What's this?! It looks like Rebecca, who has never played anything but a defensive game...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: This ring is a place for killing!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: If you can't slice a man down...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: That's what'll get the crowd excited!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: The "UNDE- FEATED WOMAN" stands power- less before this foe!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: You go and protect the girl!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #19
dialogue.text: I'll go and buy some- thing for you to eat...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #21
dialogue.text: that toy sol- deer cried and screamed so, it was quite irritat- ing to watch...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #27
dialogue.text: Why is he causing such a ruckus...?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #36
dialogue.text: Wait!! If we leave now, our comrades will fall!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #38
dialogue.text: We have always been ready to sacrifice our- selves!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #40
dialogue.text: If you do not move onward, what will this all have been for?!!!

dialogue.speaker: Tontatta
dialogue.text: even assuming Leo and his team succeed in the SOP Opera- lion...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #41
dialogue.text: If you do not elim- inate doFlamingo, he will restore everything to the way it was!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #43
dialogue.text: You are the only one among us...

dialogue.speaker: Tontatta
dialogue.text: What is that "Captain" to you, Leo?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #45
dialogue.text: Why do you place so much faith in him?!!

summary: Dressrosa's Toys Become Human focuses on Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6 as usopp's desperate scream causes Sugar to faint, turning Dressrosa's toys back into people and shattering Doflamingo's hidden order.
